sizing_rule.note: Allocate portfolio between risky asset (Portfolio B) and risk-free asset (RFR=1.5%) along CML to achieve target risk level. Specific allocation percentages not provided by author. This is a two-asset allocation strategy, not a per-trade position sizing rule.

source_rule_text: Allocate a portion of investable funds to a portfolio on the efficient frontier and a portion to the risk-free asset to achieve desired risk levels, rather than selecting a less risky portfolio on the efficient frontier itself.
